other_observers: Joey Kellner; Joey and I were the original finders and identifiers of this bird.
description: Structurally and size-wise, similar to the more common WAVI.  Dull, dark gray crown with a somewhat lighter supercillium. Darker line through the eye with a more of the off-white below the eye. The eye itself was dark.  Drab green back and wings. No wingbars noted. Underside a fairly uniform tone of yellow from the throat, through the chest, belly and ventBehaviors: Flitting in the tops of the trees.Call: N/APlumage: Fall
